query: Our onboarding scenario keeps ending calls before the goodbye. Scenario name is 'Customer Onboarding Walkthrough'. Find out why and fix it.
expected_behavior: Resolves the scenario ID via ttai:list_scenarios, then fetches the full scenario with ttai:get_scenario
Pulls session evidence via ttai:list_sessions filtered by scenario_id and inspects transcripts before proposing any edit
Diagnoses the root cause against the symptom table (end_session timing rule or tools_config) and quotes what the scenario prescribed versus what the agent did
Applies a surgical edit via ttai:update_scenario sending only id plus the changed fields
Reports diagnosis, change summary, token delta estimate, and the new-sessions-only reminder

query: Here's a transcript where our cold-call agent spoke the literal text '{{ lead_name }}' to a customer: [transcript]. Fix the scenario (ID 507f1f77bcf86cd799439011).
expected_behavior: Fetches the scenario with ttai:get_scenario and locates the CONTEXT section handling for the lead_name variable
Adds a missing-value fallback rule (e.g. 'If lead_name is blank, open without a name') rather than removing the variable
Keeps the ai_instructions delta small (well under +50 tokens) and makes no unrelated changes
Verifies the change by re-fetching with ttai:get_scenario after ttai:update_scenario

query: Make the AI in our sales roleplay scenario sound less robotic and more empathetic.
expected_behavior: Reads the full ai_instructions before editing and identifies the existing style rules block
Tightens or replaces existing style text instead of appending a new section, adding at most one concrete varied-acknowledgment example
Does not switch system_instructions_template or change unrelated strategy settings as a side effect
Reports the before/after and token delta
